chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5636 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي اَلرَّبِيعِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلْجَدِّ مَعَ إِخْوَةٍ لِأُمٍّ قَالَ "إِنَّ فِي كِتَابِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "أَنَّ اَلْإِخْوَةَ مِنَ اَلْأُمِّ يَرِثُونَ مَعَ اَلْجَدِّ اَلثُّلُثَ" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5636 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Khalid ibn Jarir from Abu Al-Rabi from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding the grandfather inheriting alongside maternal siblings.
Imam (as) said: "Indeed, in the Book of Ali (as), it is written that 'the maternal siblings inherit one-third along with the grandfather.'"
